economic_notes: Five nation-controlled business entities accounted for by modified equity method: Sunchild Construction GP Ltd., Sunchild Gravel GP Ltd., Sunchild Oil & Gas Ltd., Sunchild Utilities Limited Partnership, Sunchild Business Development Corp. Trust funds held for Agricultural Benefits and Treaty Land Entitlement claims litigation.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Five government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method (not consolidated). Net loss of $2,150,473 after tangible capital asset expenditures of $9,034,298. Promissory note of $2,284,032 owing to Minister of Crown-Indigenous Relations for Agricultural Benefits and Treaty Land Entitlement claims negotiation, interest-free unless in default. Trust funds - Other of $452,665 held with a law firm for litigation. Annual debt service represents repayment of demand loan only ($200,000); long-term debt obtained in current year ($625,812 CIBC mortgage). ISC funding notably higher than prior year ($27.3M vs $22.0M). expenses_education estimated as sum of all School lines plus ISET program. expenses_housing includes Housing and Band Owned Housing Administration. expenses_infrastructure includes Public Works and Public Works-Other. expenses_social includes Social Services, Social Development Service Delivery Administration, and Community Wellbeing Initiatives. No schedule of remuneration included in statements. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC + Health Canada + ISET = $32,481,076; osr calculated as total revenue minus government transfers.
